ResearchProjectDef.label: AK-47 Type 2
ResearchProjectDef.description:
The original AK-47's stamped receiver cracked. Four years of field reports said the same thing: the sheet metal couldn't handle sustained automatic fire over a full service life.
The Type 2 answered with a milled receiver — machined from a solid steel billet. Heavier. More expensive. Slower to produce. But it didn't crack.
Unlocks the AK-47 Type 2 — the first revision, the one that made the legend last.
~wololooo
